 title: Add tests for config loading real filesystem paths
 ---
 config.rs

Coverage: 79.6% (43/54 lines)

Uncovered lines: 98-101, 103-104, 110, 129, 132, 161, 172

Main function: `load_code_context_config()` (lines 98-111)
Uses real filesystem paths (~/.code-context/ and git root). Also `load_code_context_config_from_paths` Err warning paths.

Test scenarios:
- load_code_context_config() in a temp dir → verify returns non-empty config (builtin only)
- load_code_context_config_from_paths with non-existent dir → Err warning logged, continues
- merge_config_stack with all-invalid YAML entries → unwrap_or_default() returns default config
- vfs.load_all() error path (may need a broken/unreadable directory)

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
